_doc: Image registry for automation/assets.mjs (Sqwod Verified product photos, EN+DE parity). LINK/IMAGE INTEGRITY: only wire an ASIN that is (1) the NEW product (never a Renewed/Refurbished ASIN) and (2) sold by Amazon or the brand (not a 3rd-party marketplace reseller) — verify 'Sold by' + condition on the live listing before adding. Amazon's buy-box rotates, so re-verify periodically. TWO ways to fill each product: (1) MANUAL now — paste image URLs grabbed via Amazon SiteStripe; or (2) AUTO later — set `asin` and, with PA-API keys, the script pulls images. Manual `images` always win. DTC products with no clean Amazon listing (Whoop, Eight Sleep, Gymshark, Ten Thousand, Alo, Seed, Ritual, Momentous): leave empty → branded diamond placeholder. Editorial fields/scores are never touched.

apple-watch-9._note: Series 9 discontinued; amazon.de buy-box was REFURBISHED/3rd-party (rejected). Deal link now points to the new Series 11 (see verified-categories.ts). Image below is a clean Apple render kept for the historical review.

hyperice-hypervolt-2._note: Verified 2026-07-23: NEW, sold by Hyperice on amazon.de. Deal on publish: amazon.de/dp/B0CVSD725F?tag=sqwod-21

muse-s-athena._note: Verified 2026-07-23: NEW, sold by Amazon UK on amazon.de (~493 EUR); Muse EU store is cheaper (~450 EUR). Amazon deal: amazon.de/dp/B0F4F15WDD?tag=sqwod-21
